text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm in the middle of tidying my office when Fuji
Kiseki suddenly comes in.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to bother you, Trainer, but do you happen
to have any extra tissue boxes?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I forgot to order a new batch for the dorm, and I
don't have the energy to go buy more...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll be sure to bring some back once our regular
order comes in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She makes her request, then makes to leave the
office empty-handed.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ack! What am I doing?! I haven't even gotten the
tissues yet!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Sigh... How could I be so scatterbrained?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must be overtaxed from running so many
races in a row. I should revise her racing schedule
a little...
